# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

<!-- 描述本次PR的目的和内容 -->

## 🎯 Type of Change

<!-- 请勾选适用的选项 -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI changes
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test improvements

## 🔗 Related Issue

<!-- 关联的Issue编号，如：Closes #123 -->

## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] No new warnings generated

### Testing
- [ ] New tests added for new features/bug fixes
- [ ] All tests passing locally
- [ ] Test coverage maintained or improved

### TypeScript
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors introduced
- [ ] Type safety improved where possible
- [ ] No use of `any` type (unless absolutely necessary with comment)

### Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Comments/JSDoc added for public APIs
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

## ✅ Pre-merge Checklist

<!-- PR合并前必须满足 -->

- [ ] CI Pipeline passing (all checks green)
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Branch up-to-date with base branch
- [ ] Quality gates passed
